query: Evaluate how close the domestic garbage site is to playgrounds and whether it violates safety thresholds (assume 50m), assume 0.5m gsd.
final_answer: The domestic garbage site is approximately 207.77 meters away from the playground, so it does not violate the 50-meter safety threshold.
